post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 228: Boomer Mafia

If you are not currently alive in this game, please do not post in this thread. Visit this thread to sign up for future games.

Credits to Binomial-theorem/chaotic_iak/willwang123/most of the forum for the rule template and other parts of the OP.

Flavor
In the land of AoPS Mafia City, everyone was happily going about their daily business. Mafia games were proceeding as normal, and it was a great time to be had by all. However, someone was out to shake things up. From his villa in the middle-class suburb of SEville, an aged benjaminsz emerged from his long hiatus from the daily life of AoPS Mafia City. He took one look at the way Mafia was being played, and didn’t like what he saw. He gathered the citizens together for a town meeting, and declared, “This meta is trash! You have all regressed backwards horribly since I left.”

Then one brave soul, Osmium_, stepped forward and said, “OK, boomer.”

After that, benjaminsz knew what he had to do. He had to use his one-time Best Moderator Award-winning modding skills to teach these youngins a lesson.

“Alright then. You all think you are so much better than me. You think you’ve taken the meta to a better place. Well, we’ll see how you do in MY game. I will be judging you according to MY standards in the next game I mod. And I’m not telling you what they are! And I’m not even going to promise to tell the truth during the game. Since you’re so much smarter than me and I’m just a washed up old man, it should be pretty easy for you to figure me out, no?”


Rules
  • Read the rules. Including this one.
  • Follow all the rules. Including this one.
  • Do not post at night.
  • You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification. Questions asked in-thread will only be answered in-PM, if at all, unless I specifically believe it is something worth telling the general public. Absolutely no guarantee is made that anything I tell you is true, unless it is in either this OP or a post I make containing the phrase “100% Guaranteed True”. However, anything my comoderator says will always be true, unless they indicate that they are communicating in my stead, in which case they may be telling the truth or lying.
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the moderators, unless you are specifically allowed to do so.
  • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
  • Do not pretend to edit or otherwise pretend to break a rule.
  • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
  • Do not edit the tags on the thread. This also applies if you are not playing the game.


Voting/Hanging
  • This game is based on deadline hang. The player with the most votes at the time the deadline is reached is hanged. Ties will be explained in the next section. Starting Day 2, majority hanging is enabled, which means day will end early if at any time a player has more than half the amount of total votes on them. If majority hang is not reached, deadline hang occurs.
  • If there is a tie vote at the end of the day between two players, the result of it will be randomized. However, if there are an equal number of votes for No Hang and a player, No Hang will be the result.
  • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". For example, "Vote: fdas" is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", "vote: fdas", "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: Fdas" and "Vote: fdas" are not.
  • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
  • Improperly made votes (including votes in hide tags or any of the unacceptable forms above) will not be counted under any circumstances. I will not tell you if your vote is invalid.
  • You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang". (Note: This is not the same thing as unvoting.)
  • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day more than half of the players currently alive are voting for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day at least half of the players alive are voting to not hang, then nobody will be hanged. It will then be twilight.
  • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
  • During twilight (the time between the end of deadline and the moderator's "do not post" post), players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
  • Once I post an end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • There will be no public role flips in this game. Players may be PMed a flip according to undisclosed conditions. If you receive a player’s flip, you may not discuss it in the thread or anywhere else save for your own role PM, on pain of being modkilled.


Activity
  • Each day will be 264 hours (11 days). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
  • The deadline will occur the very second 264 hours has occurred.
  • Each night will be 3 real-life days long.
  • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
  • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night and start of the next day.
  • Activity rule for this game: While not on V/LA, you are expected to make at least one game-advancing post between every activity check, which will be done roughly every 48 hours. If you miss one activity check, you will get an in-game prod; if you miss two activity checks in a row, you will get a PM prod; if you miss three activity checks, you will be replaced. Do not try to abuse this by saying "activity post" every two days - I will warn or replace you if I feel you are posting purely to bypass this requirement.
  • Other activity rule for this game: While not on V/LA, you are expected to ask at least one question in your role PM about anything related to the game except for the roles and alignments of players between every activity check. There will be no prods for missing this requirement; the consequences are undisclosed. Such questions will always be answered; the truthfulness of answers is never guaranteed except under previously described conditions.
  • If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. If your V/LA will be longer than about a week, please either try to find a way to participate in the game during that time or ask for a replacement.


Etiquette
  • Do not use inappropriate language.
  • Do not make any personal attacks.
  • Be mature.
  • For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to two warnings, and SE’s/IC's up to one. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force-replaced, depending on the scenario. Please do not make me modkill you.


Moderators
  • I (benjaminsz) am the Moderator of Game 228. Osmium_ is my co-moderator.
  • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
  • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
  • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
  • Please do not do things that have the effect of impersonating a moderator. For the most part, though, posting in colors is fine. Prove you have read the whole OP by using the phrase which indicates the truthfulness of a mod communication in the thread.
  • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.


Setup
Haha no.

Actually, just kidding - I do have some things to tell you. First of all, there are no third party roles at the start of the game. Second, each player’s role may change as the game goes on, but town-aligned players will never become scum-aligned players and vice-versa. Third, each player has a series of statistics associated with them, which will change throughout the game and affect many things - your only clue as to how they are determined comes from the flavor. Fourth, there will be a series of three Events throughout the game, each of which will grant a reward to the winner - the nature of the Events is undisclosed. Finally, here are the VT and MG role PMs:

VT
You are a Vanilla Townie. You have decided to join benjaminsz’s game to show that boomer who’s boss, and he told you you were a VT. Good luck in the game.


MG
You are a Mafia Goon. You have decided to join benjaminsz’s game to show that boomer who’s boss, and he told you you were a MG. Your partners are <insert undisclosed partners here>. Your QT is here. Good luck in the game.


Since the game is over, for posterity I will link the setup doc here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1sEdYgxmk5qeix4TeHVqtMtR7X8qWmqiwSpV5kqnnBFs/edit?usp=sharing


Alive (7)
  1. tikkitamatoa++
  2. bigmath+
  3. mark888
  4. violetmx12 candythecorgi mathical8 ChompingLightning
  5. palindrome868 XrCyclone
  6. alpha_2
  7. cherryolive Radioactive1729


Dead (10)
  1. juliankuang
  2. VKU427 pog
  3. BobDBuilder321+
  4. awesomeming327. HistoricFoodie
  5. andy09 Thornclaw9000
  6. snoozingnewt+
  7. rosecasket GammaZero b12b3b MaverickMan
  8. hannahptl
  9. cw357
  10. ObjectZ asdf334 ostriches88


Significant Events


Warnings
  • juliankuang (https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2490287p20960267)
  • ostriches88 (https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2490287p21713376)


Everything in this post is 100% Guaranteed True. Let the games begin.

Congratulations to no one for winning this player abandoned game. With the possible exception of hannahptl, who died as a Game_Winner before the abandonement.

About statistics:

post_rendered:
Stuff
So some things about setup so far.

1. Role changes

According to the OP, scum will not change into town and vice versa. However, any of the two can change into a 3p later in the game. There are no 3ps at game start so there is no cult recruiting people, the mod is changing alignment unless there is some other sort of weird bm role or mech.

Additionally, people can change roles without changing alignment. For example, I was changed to a vig, then changed back. No other cases of this have been recorded.

2. Statistics

According to the OP, every player has their own stats which will change throughout the game and affect things, our clues to what it is is flavor. The flavor in the OP suggests that the mod sets the standards, which is obvious already. It also suggests that the statistics are based of meta, but not sure how that would work; I would think that there's a set system for how the statistics would work and not something the mod decides on a whim, but how you set up a system to "measure" meta, idk.

Statistics could also influence role changes.

Hot Take: AC/VC titles could count as flavor?

3. Special Powers

The VT role Pm does not include the standard "you have no power besides voice and vote" clause. This suggests that VTs may have special powers that they are not informed of. Or this could be a red herring.

4. Events

There will be 3 events in the entire game, the winner of each will get a prize. Perhaps this could influence statistics?

Additionally, people can change roles without changing alignment. For example, I was changed to a vig, then changed back. No other cases of this have been recorded.

So some things about setup so far.

1. Role changes

According to the OP, scum will not change into town and vice versa. However, any of the two can change into a 3p later in the game. There are no 3ps at game start so there is no cult recruiting people, the mod is changing alignment unless there is some other sort of weird bm role or mech.

Additionally, people can change roles without changing alignment. For example, I was changed to a vig, then changed back. No other cases of this have been recorded.

2. Statistics

According to the OP, every player has their own stats which will change throughout the game and affect things, our clues to what it is is flavor. The flavor in the OP suggests that the mod sets the standards, which is obvious already. It also suggests that the statistics are based of meta, but not sure how that would work; I would think that there's a set system for how the statistics would work and not something the mod decides on a whim, but how you set up a system to "measure" meta, idk.

Statistics could also influence role changes.

Hot Take: AC/VC titles could count as flavor?

3. Special Powers

The VT role Pm does not include the standard "you have no power besides voice and vote" clause. This suggests that VTs may have special powers that they are not informed of. Or this could be a red herring.

4. Events

There will be 3 events in the entire game, the winner of each will get a prize. Perhaps this could influence statistics?

For those of you wondering after I've posted like 2 times already why vku and ming are confscum, here.
- vku is scum. Post 206 sounds so forced and the tone is very unnatural. Additionally, it looks like an early attempt to distance ming, this is supported by the fact he only talks about something he doesn't like about ming and talks about no one else, while town would comment on everything that got their attention, which is probably not just ming. Post 548 is being a little nitpicky, but the fact vku said imho instead of imo just really pings me. Post 580 just feels off, the attitude in there doesn't feel 100% genuine. vku also pretty much doesn't comment on anything in the rest of the game which was a mess. I feel like vku is scum here trying to get away with not reading to mess that was the whole rose thing by claiming it was a dumpster fire, while I would think town would read in case it may have some gamesolving info. Looking at meta, as town at the beginning of the game, vku is not very active, but his posts actually have some real content and not just fake contribution and weak distancing attempts.

- ming is scum. ming's posts are literally all useless fluff/fake contribution. If this is scummy, depends on meta, which I will share the results of later. Post 66 and 70 are overreactions that feel like scum trying to fake a reaction or at least make it much more than they actually feel. Could be town doing this too, but feels like something scum does more. Rest of his posts are more fluffy fake contrib posts. You could make an argument that ming is trying to solve the BM mechanic, but scum does that too. Post 188 is ming literally saying he's not doing any actual stuff yet until more people show up, which makes him fluffing and fake contributing less scummy if it's not in his meta. Post 191 is me being a little nitpicky, but ming expresses surprise at cw being changed even though 224 exists although tbf he changed even more this game. But it still feels like a weak attempt to say something. Post 245 ming starts doing stuff. Post 406 is bad, if he actually read he wouldn't be saying so but I happen to have reading problems too soo. So ming has been fluffing and not contributing except one post before Requesting Replacement. So if we look into why he requested replacement, I think it's evident that ming was getting tired of the game and just didn't want to play in it after what happened. So now this might be a stretch but I feel like town just has that sort of gamesolving attitude coming into the game and ming is missing that and the fact he requested replacement kinda also kinda makes me feel like he wasn't feeling it. We also have the vku weak distancing attempt which heavily suggests scumbuddies even though the interactions aren't obvious or anything. (I'd like to take this moment to mention that everything above on ming is not enough to make him confscum, this much would be a sr at max). Ok, now to look at meta. So in his town games, at the beginning, you can see the big difference in ming's tone and that town attitude is coming through. ming still fluffs a bit and his contribution isn't the strongest, but there's still a noticeable difference from this game. Now because I'm still not veryy sure on ming, gonna look at his scum game. So at the beginning, his tone is slightly better than this game. You can't really tell if he has that town attitude going into the game, but I don't notice the lack of it either soo. I also notice less fluff, but the amount of fake contribution is on par, while his town games have more real contribution. It could be just that ming isn't feeling it this game, but I'm inclined to think this is just ming scum, especially with the distancing attempt. Although now that I think about it vku more likely scum. ming is not confscum, but a big sr. vku is confscum though.

Though his vig/sk choices have been unquestionably anti-town, I'm not sure about a cw hang. First, he told us about the dayvig power, even though the killings were anonymous. That doesn't make sense as 3p or scum. Then there's TWTBAW. I can't see an anti-town player brazenly killing consensus town, particularly a claimed pr. Then again, I don't see why town would ever do that either, but idk. Cw has had some weird reads and seemed behind on what's going on at times. That he's confused or incompetent town seems to be a more plausible explanation than 3p or scum.
I'd much prefer a snoozing hang. He claimed vt, yet we have reason to believe that he targeted bob last night. Who would target bob? Possibly a nurse or maybe even a different town pr like cop, but the most obvious choice would be scum. Bob's an active and proactive towny, by far the top poster, and responsible for most of the scumhunting this game. He was the one who got vku hung. Mafia want him dead.
